sectionSubtitle: Capabilities across security architecture, DevSecOps, compliance, and infrastructure sovereignty. Every engagement delivers blueprints your team can build — not just recommendations they'll forget.

cards.title: First Light
cards.description: Understand where you stand and what to fix first.
cards.detail: You don't know what you don't know. Your security is whatever your team has had time for — which isn't much. Start here.

cards.title: Foundation
cards.description: Build security into your foundation from the start.
cards.detail: You're building something new — a product, a platform, a company. Security decisions made now compound. Get them right.

cards.title: Pulse
cards.description: Ship fast. Ship secure. Ship with confidence.
cards.detail: Your CI/CD pipeline moves fast — but security gates are missing, manual, or bolted on after the fact. Time to fix that.
cards.ifSourcedSeparately: Sourced separately: CI/CD security audit ($5K-$10K) + secrets architecture ($5K-$10K) + container hardening ($5K-$10K) — totaling $15K-$30K.

cards.title: Clearance
cards.description: Compliance that opens doors, not just checks boxes.
cards.detail: Your next enterprise customer wants SOC 2. Your investors asked about security posture. You need to get audit-ready — without derailing your engineering team for six months.
cards.ifSourcedSeparately: Sourced separately: Standalone gap analysis ($5K-$10K) + policy development ($10K-$20K) + audit prep ($5K-$15K) — totaling $20K-$45K.

cards.title: Escape Velocity
cards.description: Own your infrastructure. Control your costs. Keep your data where you decide.
cards.detail: Your cloud bill keeps climbing. Your data lives in someone else's data center. You're paying for compute you don't fully control. Time to explore alternatives.
cards.ifSourcedSeparately: Sourced separately: Cloud audit ($5K-$10K) + migration planning ($10K-$20K) + security architecture ($10K-$20K) — totaling $25K-$50K.

cards.title: Beacon
cards.description: Security leadership without the full-time hire.
cards.detail: You need a security architect on the team — but not full-time, and not at $150K+/year. You need someone who knows your stack, reviews your decisions, and picks up the phone when something happens.

cards.title: Security Sprint
cards.description: Focused 2-week engagement on one critical area.
cards.detail: For teams that need rapid progress on a specific security concern without a full engagement.

cards.title: Surge
cards.description: One-time infrastructure deployment on your hardware. We deploy, you own.
cards.detail: Coming soon. Rapid deployment with security built in from the first commit.

cards.title: Something else on your mind?
cards.description: Every engagement is scoped individually. Let's talk about what you need.
cards.detail: If you need something specific that doesn't fit the packages above — or something more comprehensive — we'll figure out the right approach together.
